name: Claude Code Dev
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode ~/.claude && if [ ! -f ~/.claude/.claude.json ]; then BACKUP=$(ls -t ~/.claude/backups/.claude.json.backup.* 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$BACKUP" ] && cp "$BACKUP" ~/.claude/.claude.json; fi; [ ! -e ~/.claude.json ] && [ -f ~/.claude/.claude.json ] && ln -s ~/.claude/.claude.json ~/.claude.json; curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash
postStartCommand:
sudo chown vscode:vscode ~/.zsh_history_dir && mkdir -p ~/.zsh_history_dir && touch ~/.zsh_history_dir/.zsh_history && grep -qxF 'export HISTFILE=~/.zsh_history_dir/.zsh_history' ~/.zshrc || printf '
export HISTFILE=~/.zsh_history_dir/.zsh_history
export HISTSIZE=10000
export SAVEHIST=10000
setopt APPEND_HISTORY
setopt INC_APPEND_HISTORY
setopt SHARE_HISTORY
' >> ~/.zshrc && if [ -f ~/.claude.json ] && [ ! -L ~/.claude.json ]; then mv ~/.claude.json ~/.claude/.claude.json; elif [ ! -f ~/.claude/.claude.json ]; then BACKUP=$(ls -t ~/.claude/backups/.claude.json.backup.* 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$BACKUP" ] && cp "$BACKUP" ~/.claude/.claude.json; fi && [ ! -e ~/.claude.json ] && [ -f ~/.claude/.claude.json ] && ln -s ~/.claude/.claude.json ~/.claude.json || true
